parameters.formDescription: Tell us your campaign goals and we'll recommend the perfect leads for maximum impact. Our AI will analyze your preferences and suggest the optimal strategy.

values.option: 🚀 Quick Wins - Fast responses and meetings
⚖️ Balanced - Mix of verified and potential

values.fieldLabel: 📊 How many leads for your first campaign?

parameters.content:
🎯 **SMART LEAD SELECTION WORKFLOW**

**Purpose:** Intelligent lead selection from Airtable database using AI scoring and filtering

**Key Features:**
• Form-based campaign configuration
• AI-powered lead scoring & selection
• Automated Airtable updates
• Telegram notifications
• Quality-based lead filtering

**Prerequisites:**
• Airtable database with lead data
• Telegram bot for notifications
• N8N webhook access

📝 **FORM TRIGGER SETUP**

**Configuration Required:**
• Set webhook URL for form access
• Configure form fields as needed
• Test form submission

**Key Fields:**
• Campaign objective
• Risk tolerance  
• Company size preference
• Lead quantity (15-75 leads)
• Timeline urgency

**Note:** Form generates unique webhook URL for external access

🔍 **AIRTABLE SEARCH SETUP**

**Credentials Required:**
• Set your Airtable API credentials
• Verify base ID:
• Verify table ID:

**Purpose:**
• Fetches niche context (2 records)
• Gets target industry/focus data
• Feeds recommendation engine

**Fields Retrieved:**
• Target Industry
• Outreach Focus  
• Service Offering

🧠 **RECOMMENDATION ENGINE**

**Purpose:**
• Processes form preferences
• Creates campaign strategy
• Generates Airtable filters
• Sets scoring weights

**Key Outputs:**
• Strategy name & emoji
• Lead count target
• Scoring algorithm weights
• Expected outcomes
• Budget estimates

**Note:** This is a pure JavaScript code node - no external setup required

📊 **AIRTABLE LEAD FETCH**

**Credentials Required:**
• Use same Airtable credentials as search node
• Ensure proper base/table access

**Purpose:**
• Fetches leads using dynamic filter
• Gets all lead data for scoring
• Processes apollo_complete records

**Filter Source:**
• Uses filter from Recommendation Engine
• Targets specific lead criteria
• Excludes already processed leads

🎯 **SMART LEAD SCORING**

**Core Algorithm:**
• Industry relevance scoring (40%)
• Lead quality assessment (25%)
• Company size optimization (15%)
• Seniority level scoring (15%)
• Financial indicators (5%)

**Key Features:**
• Exact lead count selection
• Premium quality filtering
• Bonus multipliers for perfect matches
• Comprehensive score breakdown

**Outputs:** Selected leads + summary object

🔄 **DATA FILTERING SYSTEM**

**Two Filter Nodes:**

**Summary Filter:**
• Condition: selection_complete === true
• Gets 1 summary object
• Feeds notification system



















**Leads Filter:**  
• Condition: selection_complete === false
• Gets individual lead records
• Feeds Airtable updates

**Critical:** Proper filtering prevents data mixing

📊 **AIRTABLE UPDATES**

**Credentials Required:**
• Use your Airtable credentials
• Ensure write permissions


**Operation:** Update (single record mode)
**Matching:** Record ID field

**Fields Updated:**
• Ready for Enrichment → true
• Processing Status → existing value
• Outreach Priority → existing value  
• Data Quality → existing value
• Target Industry → from form
• Outreach Focus → from context
• Service Offering → from context

✅ **SUCCESS SUMMARY**

**Purpose:**
• Processes campaign summary
• Creates detailed Telegram message
• Provides comprehensive metrics

**Input:** Summary object from filter
**Output:** Formatted notification data

**Key Metrics:**
• Leads selected vs analyzed
• Quality distribution
• Industry relevance stats
• Campaign projections
• Next steps guidance

📱 **TELEGRAM NOTIFICATION**

**Setup Required:**
• Add your Telegram Bot credentials
• Set correct Chat ID (currently: 7049994855)
• Test bot permissions

**Message Content:**
• Campaign completion status
• Lead selection metrics
• Quality breakdown
• Industry analysis
• Budget estimates
• Next steps

**Note:** Replace Chat ID with your target chat/user ID

⚙️ **SETUP CHECKLIST**

**Required Credentials:**
□ Airtable API Token (3 nodes)
□ Telegram Bot Token (1 node)

**Configuration:**
□ Update Telegram Chat ID
□ Verify Airtable Base/Table IDs
□ Test form webhook URL
□ Validate field mappings

**Testing:**
□ Submit test form
□ Check Airtable updates
□ Verify Telegram messages
□ Validate lead selection accuracy

🚨 **TROUBLESHOOTING GUIDE**

**Common Issues:**

**Form not triggering:**
• Check webhook URL is active
• Verify form field names match code

**No leads found:**
• Check Airtable filter logic
• Verify Processing Status values
• Ensure leads exist with apollo_complete

**Telegram not sending:**
• Verify bot credentials
• Check Chat ID is correct
• Ensure bot has message permissions

**Airtable updates failing:**
• Check field name mappings
• Verify write permissions
• Validate Record ID matching

📈 **WORKFLOW PERFORMANCE**

**Expected Processing Times:**
• Form to Recommendation: ~2-3 seconds
• Lead Scoring (100 leads): ~5-10 seconds
• Airtable Updates: ~3-5 seconds
• Total Workflow: ~10-20 seconds

**Capacity Limits:**
• Max leads per run: ~500
• Recommended batch: 50-100 leads
• Form timeout: 30 seconds

**Optimization Tips:**
• Use targeted Airtable filters
• Limit lead quantity in form
• Monitor execution logs

🔄 **EXECUTE WORKFLOW SETUP**

**Required Configuration:**
□ Import "Email Validator + Company enrichment" workflow
□ Update workflow ID in Execute Workflow node
□ Ensure proper workflow permissions

**Purpose:**
• Triggers email validation pipeline
• Starts company research enrichment
• Continues lead processing chain

**Setup Steps:**
• Get workflow ID from imported enrichment workflow
• Replace current workflow ID in node settings
• Test execution permissions and data flow

**Note:** This creates automated handoff from lead selection to enrichment processing
